meaning: n.炮手,炮长,带枪猎人,管理军械(库)的准尉
examples: Then came the voice of our nose gunner.
The gunner tried to bring his guns around.
Nevertheless, with suicidal bravado, he volunteers as a tail gunner.
On his second deployment, he was a co-pilot and gunner on an Apache helicopter.
McGregor got news on his radio and turned to the gunner to warn him.
